quality.rationale: 球对称度规下的轨道微扰分析，结合守恒量与泰勒展开推导二阶线性振子方程，逻辑严密且具有天体物理背景

origin.question: # Problem 15.2.   (b) Prove that all orbits are stably planar.
origin.answer: Hence the orbits are stably planar.
origin.solution: (b) Using the constant of motion $\mathbf{L}^2$ of Problem 15.1, we have$$\left(\frac {\mathrm {d} \theta}{\mathrm {d} \lambda}\right)^{2} = \left(\mathrm {g}^{\theta \theta} \mathrm {p}_{\theta}\right)^{2} = \frac {1}{\mathrm {r}^{4}} \left(\mathrm {L}^{2} - \frac {\mathrm {p}_{\phi}^{2}}{\sin^{2} \theta}\right). \tag {1}$$Suppose that the unperturbed orbit is $\theta = \pi /2$ , $\mathbf{L} = \mathfrak{p}_{\phi} = \mathbf{K}$ . Let the particle be perturbed out of the plane of the orbit i.e. $\theta = \pi /2 + \delta \theta$ , $\mathbf{L} = \mathbf{K} + \delta \mathbf{L}$ , $\mathfrak{p}_{\phi} = \mathbf{K} + \delta \mathfrak{p}_{\phi}$ . To first order in $\delta \mathbf{L}$ and $\delta \mathfrak{p}_{\phi}$ and second order in $\delta \theta$ , Equation (1) gives$$\left[ \frac {\mathrm {d} (\delta \theta)}{\mathrm {d} \lambda}\right]^{2} = \frac {1}{\mathrm {r}^{4}} \left[ 2 \mathrm {K} \delta \mathrm {L} - 2 \mathrm {K} \delta \mathrm {p}_{\phi} - \mathrm {K}^{2} (\delta \theta)^{2}\right]$$and hence$$\frac {\mathrm {d}^{2} (\delta \theta)}{\mathrm {d} \lambda^{2}} = - \frac {\mathrm {K}^{2}}{\mathrm {r}^{4}} \delta \theta .$$This shows that $\delta \theta$ oscillates about $\theta = \pi / 2$ and does not grow in time. Hence the orbits are stably planar.
